results.content:
Product Guide — Vexatrail 55.
The Vexatrail 55 is part of our backpacks range. It is designed for three-season use and weighs less than comparable models in its class. For current price and stock, consult the product catalog; for return windows and warranty, see the category policies.

events.content: None of the guides mentioned above are specifically about the Vexatrail 55 backpack. Let me look up the warranty policy directly.

results.content:
Zephyra Outfitters Warranty — backpacks.
All backpacks sold by Zephyra Outfitters carry a 1-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. The warranty excludes normal wear, misuse, and unauthorized repairs. Warranty claims require the original order number.

Care Guide — backpacks.
To extend the life of your backpacks: clean after each trip with mild soap, dry fully before storage, and store loosely in a cool dry place. Do not machine-wash unless the product label explicitly allows it. For pricing and stock levels, consult the product catalog.

Zephyra Outfitters Return Policy — backpacks.
Customers may return backpacks within 21 days of delivery. Items must include original tags. Opened items are subject to a 10% restocking fee of the item price. Unopened returns pay only the flat return shipping fee of $7.99. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 business days of inspection.

events.content: FINAL ANSWER: The Vexatrail 55 backpack comes with a 1-year manufacturer warranty.

final_answer: The Vexatrail 55 backpack comes with a 1-year manufacturer warranty.
